zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡整理
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD报64.59，价格虽较前一交易日小幅上涨0.78%，但仍运行于20日均线66.02下方，显示中短期趋势仍偏空。日内波动区间仅64.04至64.64，市场活跃度有限，多空双方暂处于相对均衡状态，短线以震荡整理为主。

从技术指标观察，MACD数值为-0.444，仍位于零轴下方，反映市场动能尚未完全转强，空头压力依然存在。由于RSI数据暂缺，难以准确判断超买或超卖状态，但结合价格持续受压于均线来看，反弹力度仍有待进一步确认。

关键位置方面，64.00附近构成短线第一支撑，若跌破则可能下探63.50甚至63.00区域。上方阻力首先关注65.00整数关口，其后为20日均线66.02附近压力带。只有有效突破并站稳66美元上方，才有望打开进一步反弹空间。

交易策略上，稳健投资者可等待价格突破66.00并伴随成交量放大后再考虑顺势做多；激进交易者则可依托64.00支撑进行区间交易。若价格失守关键支撑，应严格设置止损，控制仓位，防范空头延续带来的下行风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 64.59, remaining below its 20-period simple moving average at 66.02, which suggests the short-term trend is still tilted to the downside despite the modest 0.78% daily gain. Price action has stabilized near the upper end of the session range, but buyers have not yet demonstrated enough strength to reclaim key moving-average resistance. As long as the market remains below the SMA(20), rallies may continue to face selling pressure from traders seeking to exit positions at better prices.

Momentum indicators also reflect a cautious outlook. The MACD reading of -0.444 indicates bearish momentum remains present, even if downside pressure appears to be moderating. While the absence of RSI data limits confirmation of overbought or oversold conditions, the combination of a negative MACD and price trading beneath the 20-period average points to a market that is still in a corrective phase rather than a confirmed uptrend. Traders should monitor whether momentum begins to improve through higher lows and stronger closes.

From a technical perspective, immediate support can be identified near the session low of 64.04, with additional support likely emerging around the psychologically important 64.00 level. A decisive break below this area could expose further downside toward the 63.00 region. On the upside, resistance is located near 64.64, the recent intraday high, followed by the SMA(20) zone around 66.02. A sustained move above 66.00 would improve the technical structure and potentially attract renewed buying interest.

Trading strategies should remain balanced and risk-conscious. Short-term traders may consider buying only after a confirmed breakout above resistance, particularly if accompanied by improving momentum indicators. More conservative participants may prefer to wait for a close above the 20-period moving average before adopting a bullish stance. Conversely, failure to hold above 64.00 could favor defensive positioning or short-side opportunities, with disciplined stop-loss placement essential given cryptocurrency market volatility.
